proposal.working_title: AI Labs Explained: How Mid-Market Teams De-Risk Enterprise AI Before Production Rollout
proposal.one_line_angle: Most enterprise AI initiatives stall because teams skip the lab stage; here is the structured pilot playbook done-for-you operators use to validate workflows on real internal data before company-wide rollout.
outline_bullets: What an AI lab actually is (and how it differs from a proof-of-concept, an R&D project, or a sandbox)
The four-stage AI lab playbook: scope a falsifiable hypothesis, pilot on production data, measure against a baseline, decide go or kill
When done-for-you teams should run a lab first vs when they should skip straight to deployment, with specific budget and timeline thresholds
